column1: 11343,simple,,,GAS PIZZA OVEN G4,1,0,visible,"The GAS PIZZA OVEN-G4 is a high-efficiency pizza oven designed for commercial use. It features a gas-powered heating system that provides consistent and even heat distribution, ensuring perfectly cooked pizzas every time. The G4 model includes a spacious cooking chamber with a durable, heat-resistant interior, allowing for multiple pizzas to be baked simultaneously. Its user-friendly controls and adjustable temperature settings offer precise cooking control, making it ideal for pizzerias and restaurants. The oven's sleek design and robust construction ensure both reliability and style in any kitchen setting.","

column1: 11345,simple,,,TABLE TOP DOUGH SHEETER-500SM,1,0,visible,"The TABLE TOP DOUGH SHEETER-500SM is a compact and efficient machine designed for small to medium-scale dough preparation. It features a table-top design that saves space while offering powerful performance. The 500SM model includes adjustable rollers to control dough thickness and consistency, making it ideal for various baked goods. Its user-friendly controls and durable construction ensure reliable operation and easy maintenance, making it a practical choice for bakeries, pizzerias, and pastry shops.","

column1: 11347,simple,,,On Stand Dough Sheeter - GP 500/1000,1,0,visible,"The On Stand Dough Sheeter - GP 500/1000 is a versatile and efficient machine designed for commercial bakeries and food production facilities. This dough sheeter features a robust stand for stability and ease of use. It can handle a wide range of dough types and thicknesses, thanks to its adjustable rollers. The GP 500/1000 model offers precise control over dough consistency and thickness, ensuring uniform results for various baked goods. Its durable construction and user-friendly design make it an essential tool for high-volume dough processing.","

Its user-friendly interface and durable construction make it a reliable choice for those seeking exceptional coffee experiences.","
